prevalence.source: Pediatric gastroenterology and IBD registry syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to growth impact and chronic disease

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical symptoms plus endoscopy with biopsy; imaging for small bowel; exclude infections

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; access to biologics and pediatric IBD specialists varies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Pediatric gastroenterology evaluation in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Steroids for flares, immunomodulators, biologics for moderate-severe disease, nutritional support
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited pediatric IBD centers and biologic access outside major cities
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing pediatric gastroenterology services and access to essential therapies
